briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby's 2025 Open Council Resolutions Index — Key Decisions Still in Progress
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is tracking dozens of resolutions from 2025 that are still in progress, including major zoning changes, new development projects, transit upgrades, and business-related bylaws. Several items — such as the e-bike share pilot, traffic control fee changes, and zoning rules for small-scale housing — are moving toward final decisions that could directly affect local business owners.
briefs.action_required: Review the in-progress resolutions — especially zoning, parking, and procurement items — that may affect your business operations.

Burnaby language translation Phase 1 — funding decision pending 2026 budget
